websites.title: Website Development
websites.description: High-performance, SEO-optimized, and responsive marketing sites, corporate portals, and e-commerce platforms. No templates or slow page builders — every line is custom-coded for speed and conversion.

includes.title: Business Websites
includes.description: Custom sites representing your corporate brand with professional UI/UX and clear calls to action.

includes.title: Landing Pages
includes.description: High-converting single-page campaigns built specifically for advertising landing flows.

includes.title: E-Commerce Websites
includes.description: Scalable online stores with custom cart flows, inventory search, and payment integrations.

includes.title: Responsive Layouts
includes.description: Seamless viewport optimization across mobile (375px), tablet (768px), and wide monitors.

includes.title: Headless CMS Support
includes.description: Integration with Sanity, Contentful, or Strapi so your marketing team can edit content independently.

includes.title: SEO & Performance Optimization
includes.description: Blazing fast load times, structured schema markups, semantic HTML, and sitemaps for Google ranking.

timeline.title: 4–8 Weeks
timeline.description: Standard business and marketing websites take 4–6 weeks; custom e-commerce and large corporate sites with CMS integration take 6–8 weeks.

pricing.title: From $8,000
pricing.description: Pricing is based on page count, third-party integrations, and CMS setup. Every project receives a detailed fixed-price contract.

faqs.question: Do you use WordPress or page builders?
faqs.answer: No. We build custom websites using React, Next.js, and Vite. This results in faster page load speeds, superior security, and infinite flexibility compared to templates.

faqs.question: Can I edit content without knowing code?
faqs.answer: Yes. We set up a user-friendly headless CMS. You can edit text, swap images, and create new posts without touching the source code. We provide full training.

faqs.question: Is hosting included?
faqs.answer: We set up deployment pipelines on Vercel, Netlify, or AWS under your own accounts. Hosting is typically $20–100/month depending on your traffic.

mobile-app-development.title: Mobile App Development
mobile-app-development.description: Premium native iOS, Android, and cross-platform mobile applications. We own the entire lifecycle — from UX wireframing and interactive prototypes to App Store deployment and real-time backend synchronization.

includes.title: iOS Native Apps
includes.description: Crafted using Swift/SwiftUI for peak performance, smooth animations, and system-level integrations.

includes.title: Android Native Apps
includes.description: Engineered with Kotlin/Jetpack Compose, ensuring full compatibility across diverse device sizes.

includes.title: Cross-Platform Apps
includes.description: Single-codebase builds using React Native or Flutter, maximizing delivery speed without compromising quality.

includes.title: Offline-First Support
includes.description: Local database sync (SQLite/WatermelonDB) so your app remains functional without a cell connection.

includes.title: Push Notifications
includes.description: Custom FCM and Apple Push Notification setups with smart user segmentation to boost retention.

includes.title: App Store Submission
includes.description: Handling app store optimization (ASO), privacy policy setups, and submission guidelines for App Store & Google Play.

timeline.title: 8–16 Weeks
timeline.description: A cross-platform MVP takes 8–10 weeks; complex native solutions requiring custom hardware integrations take 12–16 weeks.

pricing.title: From $25,000
pricing.description: Pricing reflects development across multiple platforms and API coordination. We supply phased deliverables to align with your launch window.

faqs.question: Which cross-platform framework do you recommend?
faqs.answer: We generally recommend React Native for business applications, as it integrates perfectly with modern web stacks and has a massive community. For highly graphical apps, we look at Flutter or native Swift/Kotlin.

faqs.question: Will you upload the app to our developer accounts?
faqs.answer: Yes. We configure and publish the apps directly to your corporate Apple Developer Program and Google Play Console accounts, ensuring you retain full ownership.

saas-development.title: SaaS Development
saas-development.description: Secure, multi-tenant software-as-a-service platforms engineered for revenue. We build beautiful data dashboards, role-based access control, subscription systems, and Stripe billing integrations.

includes.title: Multi-Tenant Architecture
includes.description: Secure data isolation per tenant with custom workspace subdomains (e.g. workspace.saas.com).

includes.title: Interactive Dashboards
includes.description: Dense data visualizations using Recharts/D3.js, rendering metrics with speed and clarity.

includes.title: Role-Based Access Control
includes.description: Custom permission structures for Owners, Admins, Editors, and guest roles.

includes.title: Subscription Management
includes.description: Stripe-integrated billing panels handling monthly tiers, usage-based fees, and coupons.

includes.title: Secure Authentication
includes.description: SAML, OAuth (Google, GitHub, Microsoft), Multi-Factor Authentication, and passwordless logins.

includes.title: Invoicing & In-App Alerts
includes.description: Automatic PDFs, billing history logs, and notifications for payment failures or trial expirations.

timeline.title: 12–24 Weeks
timeline.description: MVP versions with core auth, dashboards, and subscription billing take 12 weeks; full enterprise SaaS platforms take 16–24 weeks.

pricing.title: From $40,000
pricing.description: SaaS builds involve extensive backend logic and security reviews. We build modularly, allowing you to launch an MVP and fund expansion through early user growth.

faqs.question: Who owns the intellectual property (IP)?
faqs.answer: You own 100% of the code, database schemas, and designs we produce. Code is transferred to your GitHub repository at the end of each sprint.

faqs.question: Can we support annual billing and seat-based pricing?
faqs.answer: Yes. We configure Stripe Billing to support flat-rate subscription models, metered usage, tiered pricing, and seat-based seats billing.

ai-automation.title: AI & Workflow Automation
ai-automation.description: Eliminate manual operations and system bottlenecks. We build custom LLM chat widgets, AI voice agents, WhatsApp automations, and CRM synchronization scripts that run silently in the background.

includes.title: AI Chatbots & Assistants
includes.description: OpenAI/Anthropic-powered conversational assistants trained on your knowledge base to resolve customer inquiries.

includes.title: AI Calling Agents
includes.description: Twilio-integrated voice agents capable of conducting phone surveys, setting appointments, or qualifying inbound leads.

includes.title: CRM Automation
includes.description: Automated syncing between Salesforce, HubSpot, or Pipedrive and your core software platform.

includes.title: Workflow Integration
includes.description: Connecting tools via webhook pipelines (OpenAI API, Slack, Email, databases) to eliminate manual entry.

includes.title: WhatsApp & SMS Automation
includes.description: Twilio and Meta API setups for broadcast messaging, custom client notifications, and automated replies.

includes.title: Operational Audits
includes.description: Mapping your company's processes to identify repetitive steps that can be automated with code.

timeline.title: 4–8 Weeks
timeline.description: Simple CRM automation pipelines take 4 weeks; full AI-driven customer support bots and Twilio calling setups take 6–8 weeks.

pricing.title: From $15,000
pricing.description: Automation costs depend on the complexity of logic trees, the amount of data processed, and required API integrations.

faqs.question: Will we pay OpenAI/Twilio directly for API usage?
faqs.answer: Yes. We configure billing under your own organizational accounts. We also implement rate-limiting and budget alerts to prevent unexpected API bills.

faqs.question: How do you handle AI hallucinations?
faqs.answer: We use RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation), strict prompt boundaries, and system guidelines to restrict responses to your certified business documents.

api-development.title: API Development
api-development.description: Clean, modular, and fast RESTful and GraphQL API interfaces. We build secure gateways, Stripe/PayPal payment routing, sso/OAuth servers, and third-party integrations with robust documentation.

includes.title: RESTful API Engineering
includes.description: JSON APIs built with Node.js, Express, or Django following strict architectural principles.

includes.title: Third-Party Integrations
includes.description: Connecting your core systems to Plaid, Salesforce, Shopify, Twilio, or Google APIs securely.

includes.title: Payment Integration
includes.description: Securing credit card processing, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and Stripe routing.

includes.title: OAuth & SSO Gateway
includes.description: Single Sign-On solutions allowing secure client authentication across multiple portals.

includes.title: API Documentation
includes.description: Beautiful, interactive Swagger/OpenAPI specifications so internal and partner developers can integrate in minutes.

includes.title: Security & Rate Limiting
includes.description: Implementing JWT auth, CORS, HTTPS enforcement, and rate limit protections to prevent scraping and DOS attacks.

timeline.title: 6–10 Weeks
timeline.description: Standalone REST APIs with 10–20 endpoints take 6 weeks; large microservice APIs with complex database schemas take 8–10 weeks.

pricing.title: From $18,000
pricing.description: Pricing depends on security requirements, endpoints, database complexity, and whether we are integrating with legacy code bases.

faqs.question: Do you provide API documentation?
faqs.answer: Yes. Every API we build comes with interactive Swagger/OpenAPI docs, developer instructions, and mock request/response profiles.

faqs.question: How do you ensure API speed?
faqs.answer: We use database indexing, Redis caching layers, compressed payloads, and asynchronous worker queues to keep response times under 200ms.

custom-software.title: Custom Software
custom-software.description: Bespoke database-driven software solutions designed to solve your specific operational challenges. From legacy database migrations to custom admin panels and real-time monitoring platforms.

includes.title: Bespoke Database Schema
includes.description: Relational or non-relational database design (PostgreSQL, MongoDB) optimized for quick query performance.

includes.title: Legacy System Migrations
includes.description: Upgrading older databases and code bases to modern, maintainable architectures without data loss.

includes.title: Custom Admin Panels
includes.description: User-friendly back-office interfaces giving your operational teams complete control over customer data and workflows.

includes.title: Real-Time Tracking Systems
includes.description: Websocket integration providing live updates for logistics, inventories, or monitoring dashboards.

includes.title: Secure Cloud Deployments
includes.description: Dockerizing applications and setting up secure, auto-scaling clusters on AWS, GCP, or Azure.

includes.title: Ongoing Retainer Support
includes.description: Flexible maintenance packages covering security patches, hosting audits, and feature additions.

timeline.title: 12–20 Weeks
timeline.description: MVP custom systems take 12 weeks; full enterprise software suites with multi-system integrations require 16–20 weeks.

pricing.title: From $30,000
pricing.description: Custom software is structured on fixed-price deliverables. We analyze your requirements and provide a granular cost breakdown.

faqs.question: Can this system integrate with our old file systems?
faqs.answer: Yes. We build custom ETL (Extract, Transform, Load) pipelines to import and process files (Excel, CSVs, PDFs, old databases) into your new Postgres database.

faqs.question: Do you provide training for our employees?
faqs.answer: Yes. We provide complete Loom walkthroughs, detailed written handbooks, and run live training sessions for your staff post-launch.
